title: DFU - Software Update Page - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: DFU check fails with non-dismissable pop-up when one earbud is disconnected during firmware update on Software Update page
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on your connected earbud device name.
3. Go to Device Settings and select Software Update.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) check by tapping 'Check for Update' or similar.
5. While the DFU check is in progress, place one earbud into the charging case to disconnect it.
6. Observe the pop-up that appears on screen.
7. Reconnect the earbud by removing it from the charging case.
8. Observe whether the pop-up dismisses automatically or remains on screen.
expected: A pop-up appears stating 'Update currently not available, please try back later'. Reconnecting the earbud does NOT dismiss the pop-up; the user must tap 'OK' to return to the Software Update page.
